title: Moroccan Tofu Tagine
description: A flavorful and aromatic North African stew made with tofu, creamy sauce, and moroccan spices. Perfect for a cozy dinner.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large tagine or Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the cubed tofu and cook until lightly browned, about 5 minutes.
Stir in the tagine spice blend and cook for 1 minute.
Add the diced tomatoes, cream, and parsley. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer, then reduce the heat to low and cook, covered, for 20-25 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened and the tofu is coated.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
